data.title: Pinewood Technologies to Announce Full-Year Results Amid Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Pinewood Technologies ( (GB:PINE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC announced it will release its full-year results for the eleven months ended 31 December 2024 on 1 April 2025. The announcement highlights Pinewood’s strategic initiatives, including its recent independence and partnership with Lithia Motors Inc., which positions the company for growth in the North American market. This development is significant for stakeholders as it reflects Pinewood’s commitment to expanding its global footprint and enhancing its service offerings in the automotive software industry.

More about Pinewood Technologies

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC is a leading cloud-based software provider for the automotive industry, offering a comprehensive automotive intelligence platform. Established in 1981 and headquartered in the UK, Pinewood serves over 30,000 users across 21 countries and collaborates with more than 50 OEM brands. The company became independent in 2024 after separating from Pendragon PLC and has formed a strategic partnership with Lithia Motors Inc. to expand its market presence in North America.

YTD Price Performance: -6.96%

Average Trading Volume: 260,484

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £326.5M

data.title: Urban Logistics REIT Announces Strategic Moves and Shareholder Consultation
data.description:
Urban Logistics REIT plc ( (GB:SHED) ) has shared an announcement.

Urban Logistics REIT plc has announced a shareholder consultation exercise regarding its proposed internalization, which aims to enhance alignment with shareholders and secure a leading logistics real estate management team. The company has also disposed of three assets for £26.3 million, reflecting a strategic move to recycle capital into higher-yielding opportunities. With 122 asset management opportunities identified, Urban Logistics is poised for significant EPS growth and capital value uplift. The company continues to benefit from strong sector dynamics, including high tenant demand and limited new space availability, positioning it well for future growth.

More about Urban Logistics REIT plc

Urban Logistics REIT plc is a London-listed real estate investment trust specializing in the rapidly growing ‘last touch’ logistics sub-sector. The company focuses on managing and developing logistics assets, with a strategic emphasis on active asset management and core assets to maximize income and capital value. Urban Logistics has consistently outperformed the UK REIT sector and relevant indices since its IPO in 2016.

YTD Price Performance: 25.59%

Average Trading Volume: 2,412,273

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £609.3M

data.title: AMTD Group Announces New Film ‘A Gilded Game’ Starring Andy Lau
data.description:
The latest update is out from AMTD IDEA Group Class A ( (SG:HKB) ).

AMTD Group, in collaboration with its subsidiary AMTD Digital and World Media and Entertainment Universal Inc., has announced the upcoming release of a new movie titled ‘A Gilded Game,’ set to premiere in China on May 1. The film, starring Andy Lau and Oho Ou, marks AMTD’s fourth collaboration with Lau, following previous box office successes. This venture underscores AMTD’s commitment to producing high-quality entertainment and is expected to further solidify its position in the media and entertainment industry.

More about AMTD IDEA Group Class A

AMTD Group is a conglomerate with a core business portfolio that spans media and entertainment, education and training, and premium assets and hospitality. AMTD IDEA Group, a part of AMTD, is a diversified institution and digital solutions group that connects companies and investors with global markets, offering comprehensive business services and digital solutions.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$1.43B

data.title: Tocvan Ventures Reports High-Grade Gold Finds at Gran Pilar Project
data.description:
Tocvan Ventures Corp. ( (TSE:TOC) ) just unveiled an update.

Tocvan Ventures Corp. announced promising results from its recent core drilling at the Gran Pilar Gold Silver Project in Sonora, Mexico. The drilling revealed significant gold mineralization, including 1.6 g/t gold over 36.3 meters from the surface, with higher grades of 15.2 g/t over 1.2 meters and 5.8 g/t over 3 meters. These results represent an upgrade from previous local historic drilling, indicating potential for moderate to high-grade ore sourcing for future mining operations. The company is awaiting results from six additional drill holes, which will contribute to a maiden resource estimate and further development plans.

More about Tocvan Ventures Corp.

Tocvan Ventures Corp. is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on gold and silver exploration. The company is primarily involved in the development of the Gran Pilar Gold Silver Project located in Sonora, Mexico, where it holds a majority stake in partnership with Colibri Resource Corp.

YTD Price Performance: 33.33%

Average Trading Volume: 23,961

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$36.88M

data.title: OMV AG Announces Treasury Share Transfer to Executives
data.description:
OMV AG ( (DE:OMV) ) has shared an announcement.

OMV AG has announced its intention to transfer treasury shares to its Executive Board and Senior Managers as part of the Long-Term Incentive Plan 2022 and the Share Part of the Annual Bonus 2024. This transfer, set to commence on April 1, 2025, involves up to 269,601 no-par value bearer shares, representing approximately 0.082% of the company’s registered share capital. The move is designed to align the interests of senior management with those of shareholders, though it will not affect the stock exchange listing of the shares.

More about OMV AG

OMV Aktiengesellschaft is a prominent player in the oil and gas industry, primarily engaged in the exploration, production, refining, and marketing of oil and gas. The company also focuses on the production of petrochemicals and operates in various international markets.

data.title: Centrica’s Major Holdings Shift with JPMorgan’s Increased Stake
data.description:
Centrica ( (GB:CNA) ) has issued an announcement.

Centrica plc has announced a change in its major holdings due to an acquisition or disposal of voting rights by JPMorgan Chase & Co. This transaction resulted in JPMorgan holding a total of 5.549871% of voting rights in Centrica, an increase from the previous 5.257960%. This adjustment in holdings could influence Centrica’s governance and strategic decisions, potentially impacting stakeholders and market perceptions.

More about Centrica

Centrica plc is a UK-based energy company listed on the London Stock Exchange. It is primarily involved in the production and supply of electricity and gas, serving residential and commercial customers. The company is registered in England & Wales and operates with a focus on the UK market.

data.title: TotalEnergies Executives Acquire Performance Shares
data.description:
TotalEnergies SE ( (FR:TTE) ) has issued an announcement.

TotalEnergies SE announced the acquisition of free performance shares by several of its senior executives, including Helle Kristoffersen, Aurélien Hamelle, Stéphane Michel, and Bernard Pinatel. These transactions, conducted outside a trading venue, align with the company’s commitment to rewarding its leadership and enhancing stakeholder value, reflecting its strategic focus on sustainability and energy transition.

More about TotalEnergies SE

TotalEnergies is a global integrated energy company engaged in the production and marketing of various forms of energy, including oil, biofuels, natural gas, green gases, renewables, and electricity. With a workforce of over 100,000 employees, the company operates in approximately 120 countries and emphasizes sustainability in its strategy and operations.

data.title: GMG Secures C$5.8 Million in Bought Deal Financing to Boost Production and R&D
data.description:
Graphene Manufacturing Group Ltd ( (TSE:GMG) ) has shared an announcement.

Graphene Manufacturing Group Ltd. has successfully closed a bought deal financing, raising C$5,796,000 through the issuance of 7,245,000 units. The proceeds will be used to expand production capacity, enhance research and development for graphene aluminium-ion batteries, and prepare for a potential uplisting on a major United States exchange. This financial move is expected to bolster GMG’s market position and operational capabilities, potentially impacting stakeholders positively by driving growth and innovation in the clean-technology sector.

More about Graphene Manufacturing Group Ltd

Graphene Manufacturing Group Ltd (GMG) is an Australian clean-technology company specializing in energy saving and energy storage solutions, utilizing graphene produced through its proprietary process. The company focuses on commercial scale-up capabilities and market applications, particularly in graphene-enhanced HVAC-R coatings and graphene lubricant additives for diesel engines. GMG is also advancing the development of graphene aluminium-ion batteries in collaboration with the University of Queensland, supported by the Australian Government.

Average Trading Volume: 168,353

Current Market Cap: C$79.13M

data.title: MPC Container Ships Completes USD 75 Million Bond Tap Issue
data.description:
MPC Container Ships ASA ( (MPZZF) ) has provided an update.

MPC Container Ships ASA has successfully completed a USD 75 million tap issue in its senior unsecured sustainability-linked bond, which matures in October 2029. The proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, including refinancing debt and acquiring maritime assets, with plans to list the bonds on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

More about MPC Container Ships ASA

MPC Container Ships ASA is a leading provider in the container shipping industry, focusing on small to mid-size container ships. The company primarily owns and operates a portfolio of container ships that serve intra-regional trade lanes on fixed-rate charters. It is based in Oslo, Norway.
